programmes.show_description: Goring & Wallingford. Fly fishing & lobster on the lawn, Michel enjoys the high life, cooking up a lamb stew, roast duck, halibut with saffron & sherry & a summer pudding. S2, Ep5
All Day Dining. Guy visits a gastropub marrying pork belly with octopus. And in Wyoming, he visits a log cabin-turned restaurant cooking up a banana bread French toast mash-up. S20, Ep5
Dynamite Duos. Guy Fieri checks out spots keeping it in the family. In New York, a sibling spot pickles, smokes, cures and ferments everything from goat necks to pig ears. S19, Ep5
Far Out. Guy Fieri is homing in on eateries that do things differently. In Hoboken, a Cuban joint is serving salt cured beef and all kinds of classic Cuban appetisers. S16, Ep3
A Festival Of Flavour. Guy Fieri pulls over for the bounty of the county. A Denver bar creates savoury apple strudel and in Arizona a Pakistani spot serves goat and tandoori Chicken. S17, Ep7

Fish Stew And Asian Beef. On the menu are flashy fish stew, saffron sauce and garlic bread. Plus, seared Asian beef, best noodle salad and ginger dressing. S1, Ep2
Fish Baps And Mushroom Farfalle. Jamie makes his best fish baps, mushy peas and tartare sauce. Later he cooks mushroom farfalle with blue cheese and a hazelnut and apple salad. S1, Ep5
White Fish Tagine And Spicy Cajun Chicken. Jamie cooks white fish tagine, with carrot, mint and clementine salad. Plus, Spicy Cajun chicken, smashed sweet potato and corn salsa. S1, Ep31
Asian Fish And Ultimate Pork Tacos. Jamie shows how to make Asian fish, miso noodles and crunchy veg. Plus, the ultimate pork tacos, spicy black beans and avocado garden salad. S1, Ep38
Grilled Tuna And Thai Chicken. Jamie rustles up grilled tuna Niçoise salad. Plus, he makes a quick Thai chicken laksa and mildly-spiced noodle squash broth. S1, Ep21
Asian Tuna And Coconut Rice. Jamie rustles up seared Asian tuna, coconut rice and jiggy jiggy greens. Plus, ricotta fritters, fresh tomato sauce and courgette salad. S1, Ep19
With over-fishing now considered a major global crisis, chef Jamie Oliver is on a mission to convince home cooks and professionals to avoid common seafood and be more experimental.

programmes.show_name: Tom Kerridge Secrets Of The Pub Kitchen
programmes.show_description: Perfect 10. At Tom's Michelin-starred pub, the team prepare a special dish of rotisserie beef with mushroom tart and walnut ketchup, and a luxurious rice pudding. S2, Ep1

programmes.show_name: Tom Kerridge Secrets Of The Pub Kitchen
programmes.show_description: Memory Lane. There's a trip down memory lane for Tom and his team as they celebrate the pub's 10th anniversary. They make a dish inspired by his childhood. S2, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Tom Kerridge Secrets Of The Pub Kitchen
programmes.show_description: Stateside. Tom serves up delicious pub dishes influenced by America. The menu includes lemon meringue pie, 'dirty' mac and cheese and Caesar salad. S2, Ep3

programmes.show_name: Tom Kerridge Secrets Of The Pub Kitchen
programmes.show_description: Game On. The pub's intense cleaning routine is revealed. Plus, the chefs cook an amazing chilli con carne with slow-cooked venison, rice cream and chocolate. S2, Ep4

programmes.show_name: Tom Kerridge Secrets Of The Pub Kitchen
programmes.show_description: Double Acts. Tom showcases pairs of ingredients that work in harmony. There's turbot with hollandaise, cheese and onion scones and a toffee apple crumble cake. S2, Ep5

programmes.show_name: Tom Kerridge Secrets Of The Pub Kitchen
programmes.show_description: French Connection. Tom reveals how his training in French-style cookery has influenced the pub's kitchen and menu. He makes clafoutis, cassoulet and frangipane tart. S2, Ep6

programmes.show_name: Tom Kerridge Secrets Of The Pub Kitchen
programmes.show_description: Fast And Fresh. Tom gets a delivery of Isle of Wight tomatoes for an iconic dish that is back on the menu. Plus, she shares three fast, fresh dishes to cook at home. S2, Ep7

programmes.show_name: Tom Kerridge Secrets Of The Pub Kitchen
programmes.show_description: Spice Route. In the pub, a traditional shepherd's pie is given an Indian twist. Plus, Tom cooks lamb curry, Thai fishcakes and spiced pineapple tarte tatin. S2, Ep8

programmes.show_name: Tom Kerridge Secrets Of The Pub Kitchen
programmes.show_description: Good Eggs. Tom showcases the magic properties of eggs. Custard tart is on the menu, and Tom shares how to make foolproof white chocolate and lemon soufflés. S2, Ep9

programmes.show_name: Tom Kerridge Secrets Of The Pub Kitchen
programmes.show_description: Italian Job. Tom's menu includes wild boar lasagne, sausage and fennel rigatoni and tiramisu pots. Chef Sarah takes control when a rush of orders hits the kitchen. S2, Ep10
Florence. Adam's in Florence tasting iconic foods named after this city, including steak Florentine style and street food called Lampredotto alla Fiorentina. S1, Ep1
Milan. Adam is in Milan tasting the most iconic foods named after this city, including an amazing risotto alla Milanese and a delicious minestrone. S1, Ep2
Parma. Adam's in Parma tasting iconic foods named after the city, including tortelli di Parma, prosciutto and a local cake called la torta Duchess di Parma. S1, Ep3
Venice. Adam is in Venice to taste dishes that are not only named after it but imbibe the soul of the city, from a seafood pasta to the original tiramisu. S1, Ep4
Turin. Adam is in Turin tasting the most iconic foods named after this city including an amazing breaded beef cutlet and a veal and tuna favourite. S1, Ep5
Genoa. Adam is in Genoa tasting the most iconic foods named after the city, including a pasta dish made with pesto Genovese and a fish stew called burrida. S1, Ep6
Bologna. Adam's in Bologna tasting the most iconic foods named after this city, including Bolognese sauce and a sweet made with rice and almonds. S1, Ep7
Naples. Adam's in Naples tasting iconic foods named after this city, including the classic Napolitina pizza and a pasta dish called spaghetti alle vongole. S1, Ep8
Bari. Adam's in Bari tasting the most iconic foods named after this city, including focaccia Barese and a local seafood dish called tiella Barese. S1, Ep9
Rome. Adam's in Rome tasting the most iconic foods named after this city, including pasta dish cacio e pepe, and porchetta Romana: suckling pig Rome style. S1, Ep10
Mary shares her favourite Easter recipes, including hot cross buns and roast lamb. Plus, she looks at how Christian communities celebrate Easter with food. S1, Ep1
Mary explores the wonderful foods that bring each different community together on Easter Sunday. Then, she uses this as inspiration to cook her own feast. S1, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Tom Kerridge Secrets Of The Pub Kitchen
programmes.show_description: Classic Combos. Tom creates classic 'double acts' with two key ingredients. On the menu are fish and chips, steak and ale pie and bread and butter pudding. S1, Ep3

programmes.show_name: Tom Kerridge Secrets Of The Pub Kitchen
programmes.show_description: Spice Route. In the pub, a traditional shepherd's pie is given an Indian twist. Plus, Tom cooks lamb curry, Thai fishcakes and spiced pineapple tarte tatin. S2, Ep8
Fish. Tom brings an all-time favourite dish to his Sunday table: fish and chips. He bakes a beautiful side of salmon in brown butter and makes perfect triple-cooked chips. S1, Ep4
French. Tom pays homage to the South of France. He makes a seafood bouillabaisse with sea bass, red mullet and shellfish, and praline and chocolate profiteroles. S2, Ep8

Tacos And Tots. Guy Fieri visits joints taking childhood favourites to a gourmet level. They include a Denver bar cooking up tater tots, pork rinds and a pastrami sandwich. S17, Ep1
Peppers, Pork, And Poutine. Guy Fieri looks at standout veggie and meat dishes. A Phoenix chef puts her spin on a regional pork dish, and a Toronto joint serves up a Canadian staple. S17, Ep5
From Pound Cake To Pot Pie. Guy Fieri pulls in for a mishmash of comfort food. He makes stops in Philadelphia, Leucadia, Cali and Phoenix. S17, Ep9
Authentic Eats. Guy Fieri finds real deal authentic eats in unusual spots. In St. Louis, he is being served rice and beans, pot stickers, and pulled pork pasta. S16, Ep1

Lamb Lollipops And Prawn Linguini. Jamie cooks lamb lollipops, curry sauce and rice and peas. Plus, prawn linguini and Sicilian shaved fennel salad. S1, Ep6
Lamb Tagine And Chicken Caesar Salad. Jamie makes a quick and easy lamb tagine, pan-fried aubergine and cumin crunch. Plus, crispy polenta chicken Caesar salad. S1, Ep22
Lamb Kofte And Keralan Veggie Curry. On the menu this time is lamb kofte, pitta and Greek salad. Plus, Keralan veggie curry, poppadoms, rice and fresh mint yoghurt. S1, Ep30
Lamb Meatballs And Chicken Salad. Jamie rustles up tasty lamb meatballs, chop salad and harissa yoghurt. Plus, an incredibly delicious and easy-to-make chicken salad. S1, Ep34
Mary shares her favourite Easter recipes, including hot cross buns and roast lamb. Plus, she looks at how Christian communities celebrate Easter with food. S1, Ep1
Mary explores the wonderful foods that bring each different community together on Easter Sunday. Then, she uses this as inspiration to cook her own feast. S1, Ep2
Cake Week. It's cake week, and the brand-new batch of bakers tackle mini cakes, a striking sponge and a scaled-down version of a home close to their hearts. S13, Ep1
Biscuit Week. The bakers tackle illusion macarons and a fruity favourite, before unleashing their creativity by making a dramatic 3D mask entirely from biscuits. S13, Ep2
Bread Week. The bakers put their stamp on a classic pizza, get in a twist with a classic pastry and tackle a Smörgåstårta, a decorative Danish sandwich cake. S13, Ep3
Mexican Week. The bakers take on the sweet bread pan dulce and tackle a Mexican street food staple, before they make a version of the milk-soaked tres leches cake. S13, Ep4
Dessert Week. It's dessert week, and the bakers tackle a classic lemon meringue pie, before creating a showstopping sponge cake with a hidden surprise. S13, Ep5
Halloween Week. The bakers tackle an apple cake, and a very spooky showstopping piñata. Whose bakes will be eerie-sistible enough to earn them star baker? S13, Ep6
Custard Week. The bakers put their twist on floating islands in the Signature, tackle a summer staple, and make custard the star of a showstopping set gateau. S13, Ep7
Pastry Week. The bakers tackle vol-au-vents, a delicious savoury snack and a 3D pie-scape depicting their favourite childhood story. S13, Ep8
Patisserie Week. It's the semi-final, and the bakers tackle mini charlottes, a vertical technical challenge and a Swedish showstopper. Who will soar into the final? S13, Ep9
The Final. The remaining bakers make a perfect picnic, a summer classic and a baked celebration of our planet. Who will be crowned the winner? S13, Ep10
